sentences.arabic: قَضَاءُ وَقْتٍ طَوِيلٍ أَمَامَ الشَّاشَةِ قَدْ يُسَبِّبُ تَعَبَ الْعَيْنَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Provođenje puno vremena ispred ekrana može uzrokovati umor očiju.
sentences.translationEn: Spending a long time in front of the screen may cause eye fatigue.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِأَخْذِ اسْتِرَاحَةٍ قَصِيرَةٍ كُلَّ سَاعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari savjetuju kratku pauzu svakog sata.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors advise taking a short break every hour.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْأَفْضَلِ قِرَاءَةُ كِتَابٍ أَوْ مُمَارَسَةُ الرِّيَاضَةِ بَدَلًا مِنَ اللَّعِبِ بِالْهَاتِفِ طَوَالَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Bolje je čitati knjigu ili se baviti sportom umjesto igranja na telefonu cijeli dan.
sentences.translationEn: It is better to read a book or practice sports instead of playing on the phone all day.
